button-one.description: When this project came in, the challenge was clear from the start. The information was highly confidential, with full visibility limited until the SLT delivered their presentation. That meant we were working with only fragments, asking precise, almost clinical questions to extract just enough clarity to move forward. Every detail had to be intentional. We weren’t just gathering information, we were piecing together a narrative under constraints. The goal was to take something tightly guarded and turn it into an infographic that not only explained the message clearly, but built anticipation and got people genuinely excited for what was coming next.

button-two.description: I worked closely with the copywriting team to reshape the content into a clear, compelling narrative, while collaborating with designers to develop animated ads and supporting page assets. Throughout the process, I partnered with the creative director to make sure everything we produced stayed aligned with what SLT had in mind, despite the limited visibility we were working with. That alignment allowed us to stay on schedule and keep momentum. From there, I focused on pushing the experience further by creating an interactive way to showcase the before and after states, giving the story a more tangible and engaging impact.

projects.color-theory: Lumen Technologies uses a balanced color system that mixes warm, high-energy tones like coral and orange with cooler hues like teal and aqua to show both innovation and reliability. The warm colors grab attention and signal action and responsiveness, while the cooler tones create a sense of trust, clarity, and technical depth. Along with gradients that suggest movement and change, the palette reflects modern tech systems that are stable at the core but always evolving.
projects.description: Complex infographic simplifying Cloud 2.0 concepts for C-level executives and stakeholders.
projects.caption: Cloud 2.0 infographic page
projects.team: Two designers including myself as lead - Copy Team
projects.summary: This infographic communicates why that shift is happening and how distributed, high-capacity, intelligent connectivity defines the next era of infrastructure, making a complex technical transformation accessible to both executive and technical audiences.
projects.ux: My approach centered on reducing cognitive load while preserving technical credibility. The experience establishes urgency first by highlighting exponential data growth and architectural strain, then transitions into a direct visual comparison between Cloud 1.0 and Cloud 2.0 so viewers can see the transformation before analyzing it. Information is layered progressively, moving from high-level context to supporting projections and finally architectural diagrams, ensuring clarity for decision-makers while maintaining depth for technical stakeholders.
projects.design: The design emphasizes contrast, hierarchy, and scale to reinforce the narrative of evolution. Centralized versus distributed architectures are positioned as visual opposites, supported by geographic mapping and network diagrams that make infrastructure expansion tangible and intuitive. Key growth metrics act as visual anchors within the scroll, creating rhythm and reinforcing urgency, while the overall visual language remains controlled, technical, and purposeful to communicate authority without overwhelming the viewer.
projects.outcome: The final piece distilled a complex architectural transition into a fast, shareable format that strengthened Cloud 2.0 thought leadership and aligned business and technical audiences around a shared understanding of network evolution. By clearly articulating why legacy systems fall short and what the future state requires, the infographic positioned the organization as a forward-looking enabler of AI-scale infrastructure and created a strong foundation for deeper strategic engagement.
projects.heroImage-alt: Cloud 2.0 infographic landing page on display of laptop.

projects.description: Interactive framework designed to showcase AI capabilities with a focus on user engagement and data visualization.
projects.summary: Cloud 2.0 Network Evolution translates a fundamental shift in enterprise infrastructure into a clear, visual narrative. As AI workloads and data demand scale beyond the limits of legacy architecture, centralized Cloud 1.0 networks can no longer sustain performance, flexibility, or growth. This infographic communicates why that shift is happening and how distributed, high-capacity, intelligent connectivity defines the next era of infrastructure, making a complex technical transformation accessible to both executive and technical audiences.
projects.ux: My approach centered on reducing cognitive load while preserving technical credibility. By clearly articulating why legacy systems fall short and what the future state requires, the infographic positioned the organization as a forward-looking enabler of AI-scale infrastructure and created a strong foundation for deeper strategic engagement.

projects.description: Enterprise level site search and UI built through collaboration with the Lumen UX team for user-centric design.
